Quality Education.reason: The course is fundamentally about providing quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) by developing critical thinking, literacy (4.6), and skills for professional careers (4.4).

Cultivate the ability to think critically and to read independently
Skills acquired in this course will be largely transferrable and applicable outside of the classroom or after graduation

being able to communicate effectively with others in a number of ways in the English language is an indispensable skill for most professional careers
